examples: The seamstress bordered the dress with flowers.
The seamstress bound the hem of the dress with a ruffle.
Betsy Ross a seamstress is said to have contributed to this design.
The layoffs didn't surprise Martha Didio, who had been a Hulme seamstress since 1984.
For two years, Walker worked as a seamstress for James Lesley, a young merchant and abolitionist.
